MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike The Claim Of Kyle Murphy is Granted with ten days leave to file an amended claim. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
